Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dolphin Progress Release 2603 295 upvotes, 49 comments
  2. WolfIP: Lightweight TCP/IP stack with no dynamic memory allocations 80 upvotes, 12 comments
  3. The Met releases high-def 3D scans of 140 famous art objects 206 upvotes, 41 comments
  4. DDR4 Sdram – Initialization, Training and Calibration 64 upvotes, 15 comments
  5. Shall I implement it? No 659 upvotes, 243 comments
  6. Long Overlooked as Crucial to Life, Fungi Start to Get Their Due 85 upvotes, 23 comments
  7. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 247 upvotes, 84 comments
  8. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 995 upvotes, 388 comments
  9. Forcing Flash Attention onto a TPU and Learning the Hard Way 35 upvotes, 7 comments
  10. Show HN: OneCLI – Vault for AI Agents in Rust 118 upvotes, 38 comments
  11. Show HN: Understudy – Teach a desktop agent by demonstrating a task once 81 upvotes, 24 comments
  12. Reversing memory loss via gut-brain communication 209 upvotes, 75 comments
  13. Show HN: OpenClaw-class agents on ESP32 (and the IDE that makes it possible) 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. Document poisoning in RAG systems: How attackers corrupt AI's sources 51 upvotes, 18 comments
  15. The Cost of Indirection in Rust 80 upvotes, 33 comments
  16. Innocent woman jailed after being misidentified using AI facial recognition 318 upvotes, 172 comments
  17. Runners who churn butter on their runs 83 upvotes, 43 comments
  18. Launch HN: IonRouter (YC W26) – High-throughput, low-cost inference 43 upvotes, 19 comments
  19. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Show HN: Axe – A 12MB binary that replaces your AI framework 138 upvotes, 93 comments
  21. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 153 upvotes, 109 comments
  22. NASA's DART spacecraft changed an asteroid's orbit around the sun 103 upvotes, 72 comments
  23. Bringing Chrome to ARM64 Linux Devices 60 upvotes, 39 comments
  24. Big data on the cheapest MacBook 298 upvotes, 249 comments
  25. Show HN: Detect any object in satellite imagery using a text prompt 11 upvotes, 5 comments
  26. Are LLM merge rates not getting better? 111 upvotes, 110 comments
  27. ATMs didn't kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 308 upvotes, 355 comments
  28. US private credit defaults hit record 9.2% in 2025, Fitch says 227 upvotes, 330 comments
  29. The Road Not Taken: A World Where IPv4 Evolved 49 upvotes, 101 comments
  30. Converge (YC S23) Is Hiring a Founding Platform Engineer (NYC, Onsite) 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 13 March 2026. Source here.
